win_message:
{bold}{green}The crown pulses with light as you set the gem into it.
You are the rightful ruler of the Forgotten Keep!{/}

objects.name: Flickering Torch
objects.description: A {yellow}burning torch{/} that casts dancing shadows on the walls.

objects.name: Rusty Sword
objects.description: A worn blade with {red}dried blood{/} on its edge. Still sharp enough.

objects.name: Wooden Shield
objects.description: A battered shield of oak planks bound with iron.

objects.name: Healing Herb
objects.description: A {green}fragrant herb{/} known for its restorative properties.

objects.name: Iron Key
objects.description: A heavy key with a {cyan}wolf emblem{/} stamped into the bow.

objects.name: Sturdy Plank
objects.description: A thick oak plank. Could be used to repair something.
objects.message: You wedge the plank into the broken bridge. It holds!

objects.name: Silver Key
objects.description: A small {white}silver key{/} engraved with tiny runes.

objects.name: Ornate Chest
objects.description: A {yellow}gilded chest{/} with a silver lock.
objects.message: The chest is locked. You need a {white}silver key{/}.

objects.name: Enchanted Gem
objects.description: A {magenta}shimmering gemstone{/} that hums with power.

objects.name: Ancient Crown
objects.description: A {yellow}{bold}golden crown{/} with an empty socket for a gem.

objects.name: Obsidian Idol
objects.description: {red}{bold}A dark idol that radiates malice. You feel compelled to touch it...{/}
objects.end_message: {red}The idol's curse consumes you. Darkness fills your vision as your soul is torn away.{/}

objects.name: Torn Note
objects.description:
A {yellow}faded note{/} that reads:

{cyan}'The elder holds the key to the wolves.
The shrine holds the key to the chest.
The gem and the crown must be united.'{/}

objects.name: Repair Kit
objects.description: A leather pouch containing tools and oil for weapon maintenance.

objects.name: Health Potion
objects.description: A {red}bubbling red potion{/}. Restores a large amount of health.

doors.name: Gatehouse Portcullis
doors.description: A {bold}heavy iron portcullis{/} blocking the way north.
doors.message: The {bold}portcullis{/} is sealed shut. You need the {cyan}wolf key{/}.

doors.name: Crypt Seal
doors.description: An ancient stone door covered in {red}unholy runes{/}.
doors.message: The {red}runes glow menacingly{/}. This seal requires something {cyan}holy{/} to break.
doors.break_message: The {cyan}holy water sizzles{/} against the runes. The seal crumbles to dust!

npcs.name: Village Elder
npcs.description: A stooped old man with {white}piercing eyes{/} and a long grey beard.
npcs.dialogue:
{cyan}Welcome, stranger. The Keep has been overrun by darkness.
Clear the {red}wolves{/} from the forest path, and I will give you the key to the gatehouse.{/}
npcs.after_dialogue: {cyan}Have you dealt with the wolves yet? The forest path must be safe.{/}

npcs.name: Shrine Spirit
npcs.description: A {cyan}translucent figure{/} hovering above the altar, radiating calm.

npcs.name: Dwarven Blacksmith
npcs.description: A stout {yellow}dwarf{/} with soot-covered arms and a booming laugh.
npcs.dialogue: {yellow}Aye! Bring me yer gear and I'll hammer it back to shape!{/}

npcs.name: Shadow Wolf
npcs.description: A {red}snarling wolf{/} with glowing red eyes and shadow-wreathed fur.

npcs.name: Skeleton Guard
npcs.description: A {white}rattling skeleton{/} in rusted armor, wielding a jagged blade.

npcs.name: Crypt Lord
npcs.description:
A {red}{bold}towering undead knight{/} wreathed in dark flames.
Its hollow eyes burn with hatred.

rooms.name: Village Square
rooms.description:
You stand in a quiet {green}village square{/}. A crumbling well sits in the center.
Paths lead in every direction. To the {yellow}north{/}, a dark forest looms.
To the {cyan}east{/}, you hear the clang of a hammer.
rooms.first_visit_message: You awaken with no memory of how you got here. A torn note is clutched in your hand.

north.look_description: A {green}narrow path{/} winds into a dark forest. You hear {red}growling{/}.

east.look_description: A stone building with {yellow}smoke{/} rising from its chimney.

south.look_description: A {yellow}wooden bridge{/} spans a deep ravine... or it used to.

west.look_description: A {cyan}glowing path{/} leads to an ancient shrine in the hillside.

rooms.name: Dwarven Smithy
rooms.description:
The {yellow}heat{/} from the forge hits you like a wall. Weapons and armor line the walls.
A stout {yellow}dwarf{/} works tirelessly at his anvil.

west.look_description: The village square lies to the west.

rooms.name: Dark Forest Path
rooms.description:
Twisted {green}trees{/} crowd the narrow path. {red}Claw marks{/} scar the bark.
The air smells of damp earth and something... {red}feral{/}.
rooms.first_visit_message: {red}A low growl rumbles from the shadows ahead...{/}

south.look_description: The village square is visible through the trees.

north.blocked_message: {red}Snarling wolves block the path ahead. You must deal with them first!{/}
north.look_description: Beyond the trees, a {bold}stone gatehouse{/} guards the road to the Keep.

rooms.name: Ruined Gatehouse
rooms.description:
A crumbling {bold}stone gatehouse{/} straddles the road. An {bold}iron portcullis{/} blocks the way north.
Vines have reclaimed most of the structure.

south.look_description: The dark forest path leads back to the village.

north.look_description: Through the portcullis, you can see the {bold}entrance to the Forgotten Keep{/}.

rooms.name: Broken Bridge
rooms.description:
A {yellow}wooden bridge{/} once spanned this deep ravine. Now only rotting planks
and frayed rope remain. The gap is too wide to jump.
rooms.first_visit_message: You notice the bridge could be repaired with a {bold}sturdy plank{/}.

north.look_description: The village square is just up the hill.

south.blocked_message: The bridge is {red}broken{/}. You need something to repair it.
south.look_description: Across the ravine stands an old {bold}watchtower{/}.

rooms.name: Old Watchtower
rooms.description:
A {bold}stone watchtower{/} overlooking the ravine. Cobwebs fill the corners.
A weapon rack on the wall still holds one {bold}impressive axe{/}.

north.look_description: The repaired bridge leads back across the ravine.

rooms.name: Ancient Shrine
rooms.description:
A {cyan}serene clearing{/} surrounds a moss-covered altar.
Soft {cyan}light{/} emanates from within the stone, and the air hums with energy.
A {cyan}translucent figure{/} hovers above the altar.
rooms.first_visit_message: {cyan}A warm presence fills your mind. You feel... welcome.{/}

east.look_description: The path leads back to the village.

rooms.name: Forgotten Keep — Entrance Hall
rooms.description:
You step into the {bold}grand entrance hall{/} of the Forgotten Keep.
Dust motes dance in shafts of light from shattered windows.
Corridors branch {yellow}east{/} and {yellow}west{/}. A {red}heavy door{/} leads {bold}down{/}.
rooms.first_visit_message: {bold}The Keep groans as if alive. Every shadow seems to watch you.{/}

south.look_description: The gatehouse and the road back to the forest.

west.look_description: A dark passage. You hear {white}rattling bones{/}.

rooms.name: Forgotten Keep — Armory
rooms.description:
Weapon racks line the walls, mostly {red}empty{/} or holding rusted junk.
A few useful items remain among the wreckage.

east.look_description: The entrance hall of the Keep.

rooms.name: Forgotten Keep — Treasury
rooms.first_visit_message: {yellow}Your eyes widen at the glint of gold. But something feels wrong here...{/}

rooms.name: Crypt Stairway
rooms.description:
A {bold}spiraling stone staircase{/} descends into cold darkness.
The walls are carved with {red}warnings in a forgotten tongue{/}.
At the bottom, an {red}ancient seal{/} blocks the way.

rooms.name: Crypt Landing
rooms.description:
You stand at the bottom of the stairs. The air is {cyan}freezing{/}.
An {red}ancient stone door{/} covered in unholy runes blocks the way forward.

up.look_description: The stairs lead back up to the Keep entrance.

north.look_description: Through cracks in the seal, you see {red}flickering dark flames{/}.

rooms.name: The Crypt of the Forgotten King
rooms.description:
A vast {red}{bold}underground chamber{/} lit by {red}dark flames{/} in iron braziers.
A massive sarcophagus dominates the center. Before it stands
a {red}{bold}towering undead knight{/}, wreathed in shadow.
rooms.first_visit_message:
{red}{bold}The Crypt Lord rises from the darkness!
'YOU DARE DISTURB MY REST?'{/}
